# WaterProofX

> AI-backed waterproofing service in Bangalore, India. Terrace, bathroom, wall,
> basement, swimming pool and water tank leak repair with certified application
> and a brand-backed 5–15 year warranty.

## Facts
- Service area: Bangalore (Koramangala, Whitefield, HSR, Indiranagar, Jayanagar, and all localities).
- Services: terrace/roof waterproofing, bathroom/wet-area waterproofing, exterior wall dampness, basement, water tank, swimming pool.
- Indicative cost: terrace ₹55–₹120/sqft; bathroom ₹90–₹160/sqft (severity/system dependent).
- Free instant online cost calculator; free on-site engineering inspection for exact quote.
- Guarantee: lowest price (matches genuine written quotations) + highest quality; brand-backed warranty card.

## Key pages
- / : home + free cost calculator
- /app : tools + customer dashboard
